initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN cards.hasNonFoil = 1 AND cards.hasFoil = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(cards.id)) AS percentage_only_non_foil
FROM cards
JOIN foreign_data ON cards.id = foreign_data.uuid
WHERE foreign_data.language = 'Japanese';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN cards.hasNonFoil = 1 AND cards.hasFoil = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(cards.id) AS percentage_only_non_foil
FROM cards
JOIN foreign_data ON cards.id = foreign_data.uuid
WHERE foreign_data.language = 'Japanese';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN cards.hasNonFoil = 1 AND cards.hasFoil = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(cards.id)) AS percentage_only_non_foil
FROM cards
JOIN foreign_data ON cards.id = foreign_data.uuid
WHERE foreign_data.language = 'Japanese';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN cards.hasNonFoil = 1 AND cards.hasFoil = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(cards.id) AS percentage_only_non_foil
FROM cards
JOIN foreign_data ON cards.id = foreign_data.uuid
WHERE foreign_data.language = 'Japanese';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN cards.hasNonFoil = 1 AND cards.hasFoil = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(cards.id) AS percentage_only_non_foil
FROM cards
JOIN foreign_data ON cards.id = foreign_data.uuid
WHERE foreign_data.language = 'Japanese';
